q.en: In what year did the two Voyager spacecraft launch, and how far apart?
q.zh: 两艘旅行者号航天器是哪一年发射的，相隔多久？

explain.en: The timeline states: '1977 Voyager 1 and Voyager 2 launch 16 days apart.'
explain.zh: 时间线写道：“1977年，旅行者1号和2号相隔16天发射。”

q.en: What was the Voyagers' original main mission?
q.zh: 旅行者号最初的主要任务是什么？

options.en: To study the Sun up close

explain.en: The book says: 'Their mission was to explore Jupiter and Saturn, two of the solar system's giant outer planets.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“它们的任务是探索木星和土星——太阳系中两颗巨大的外行星。”

q.en: What technique did scientists use to speed the spacecraft toward Saturn?
q.zh: 科学家用了什么技术让航天器加速飞向土星？

explain.en: The book explains: 'Scientists solved that problem by using Jupiter's strong gravity to give the spacecraft a boost... called a gravity assist.'
explain.zh: 书中解释：科学家“利用木星强大的引力给航天器加速……称为引力助推”。

q.en: According to the glossary, what does 'interstellar' mean?
q.zh: 根据词汇表，“interstellar”是什么意思？

options.en: Of or occurring in the deep space between stars
options.zh: 发生在恒星之间深空中的，或与之相关的

explain.en: The glossary defines interstellar as 'of or occurring in the deep space between stars.'
explain.zh: 词汇表将 interstellar 定义为“发生在恒星之间深空中的，或与之相关的”。

q.en: What did the Voyagers discover about Jupiter's moon Io?
q.zh: 旅行者号在木星的卫星伊奥（Io）上有什么发现？

options.en: It has volcanoes ten times more active than all of Earth
options.zh: 它有比整个地球活跃十倍的火山

options.en: It is made of ice only

explain.en: The book states Io 'is ten times more volcanically active than all of Earth!'
explain.zh: 书中说伊奥“的火山活动比整个地球还要活跃十倍！”

q.en: What surprising feature did Saturn's moon Titan have?
q.zh: 土星的卫星泰坦（Titan）有什么令人惊讶的特征？

options.zh: 一层浓厚的雾霭——即大气层

explain.en: The book says Titan 'was surrounded by a thick haze—an atmosphere! This was such a shocking discovery.'
explain.zh: 书中说泰坦“被浓厚的雾霭——即大气层——所包围！这是个惊人的发现。”

q.en: Why is the planet Uranus unusual in its position?
q.zh: 天王星在姿态上有什么不寻常之处？

options.en: It is tipped on its side
options.zh: 它是侧躺着（歪在边上）的

explain.en: The book describes Uranus as 'This strange-looking planet is tipped on its side.'
explain.zh: 书中把天王星描述为“这颗奇怪的行星是侧躺着的”。

q.en: What is the 'Golden Record' carried by each Voyager?
q.zh: 每艘旅行者号携带的“金唱片（Golden Record）”是什么？

options.en: A message to aliens with music, art, greetings, and a map of Earth's location
options.zh: 一份给外星人的信息，含音乐、艺术、问候语和地球位置图

explain.en: The book says the record 'includes music, art, and spoken greetings... It also includes sounds from nature' and a map of Earth's location.
explain.zh: 书中说唱片“包含音乐、艺术和口头问候……也包含自然之声”，以及地球位置图。

q.en: When did Voyager 1 enter interstellar space?
q.zh: 旅行者1号是什么时候进入星际空间的？

explain.en: The timeline states: '2012 Voyager 1 enters interstellar space.' This milestone shows how the missions expanded our knowledge beyond the planets.
explain.zh: 时间线写道：“2012年，旅行者1号进入星际空间。” 这一里程碑说明任务如何将我们的认知扩展到行星之外。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in writing this book?
q.zh: 作者写这本书的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To inform readers about the Voyager missions and their discoveries in space
options.zh: 向读者介绍旅行者号任务及其在太空中的发现

options.en: To teach how to build a rocket

explain.en: The book is an informational text summarizing the Voyager spacecraft's journey and findings.
explain.zh: 这是一本概括旅行者号航天器旅程与发现的信息类读物。

prompt.en: Imagine you are designing a message for aliens. List three sounds, three pictures, and one greeting you would put on a Golden Record, and explain why.
prompt.zh: 想象你在为外星人设计一份信息。列出你会放进金唱片的三种声音、三幅图画和一句问候语，并说明原因。

en: Think about what represents life on Earth, like the book's music and nature sounds.
Choose pictures that show Earth's location or living things.
zh: 想想什么能代表地球生命，如书中提到的音乐和自然之声。
选择能展示地球位置或生物的图画。
